REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT HENRY PAN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE SPECIFIC PROVISIONS OF THE LEASE THAT HAVE BEEN BREACHED AND HOW THEY HAVE BEEN BREACHED. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION IS OVERRULED. "CONDITIONS ALLOWED TO EXIST IN A PORTION OF THE BUILDING OTHER THAN THE DEMISED PREMISES MAY CAUSE A CONSTRUCTIVE EVICTION." BUCKNER V. AZULAI (1967) 251 CAL. APP. SUPP. 2ND 1030; BUTT V. BERTOLA (1952) 110 CAL.APP.2D 128; GROH V. KOVER'S BULL PEN, INC. (1963) 221 CAL.APP.2D 611. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF COVENANT OF QUIET ENJOYMENT IS OVERRULED. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS REGARDING ACTIONS OF THIRD-PARTIES ATTRIBUTABLE TO THE LANDLORD. NATIVI V. DEUTSHCE BANK (2014) 223 CAL.APP.4TH 261; RESTATEMENT 2ND PROPERTY, PARAGRAPH 6.1, ILLUSTRATIONS 10-12. DEMURER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF WARRANTY OF HABITABILITY, GOOD FAITH AND FAIR DEALING IS OVERRULED. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS TO SUPPORT THESE CAUSES OF ACTION RE: INADEQUATE GARBAGE RECEPTACLES AND RENT INCREASE. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOT UNCERTAIN. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT HENRY PAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED. FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES FACTS TO SUPPORT PUNITIVE DAMAGES REQUEST BASED ON CONSCIOUS DISREGARD OF PLAINTIFF'S RIGHTS AND/OR SAFETY. PREVIALING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER APPORVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Dolores Chong, Esq. of Chong Law (415-438-7807) for Plaintiff and opposing party Joanne Annuzzi.
Ryan Zeller, Esq. of Hayes Scott Bonino Ellingson McLay, LLP (650-486-2886) for Defendant and moving party Henry Pan.

ARGUED. The parties do not contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HENRY PAN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the contract cause of action for Plaintiff to allege specific provisions of the lease that have been breached and how they have been breached. Demurrer to the cause of action for constructive eviction is overruled. "Conditions allowed to exist in a portion of the building other than the demised premises may cause a constructive eviction." Buckner v. Azulai (1967) 251 Cal. App. Supp. 2nd 1030; Butt v. Bertola (1952) 110 Cal.App.2d 128; Groh v. Kover's Bull Pen, Inc. (1963) 221 Cal.App.2d 611. Demurrer to the cause of action for breach of covenant of quiet enjoyment is overruled. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges facts regarding actions of third-parties attributable to the landlord. Nativi v. Deutshce Bank (2014) 223 Cal.App.4th 261; Restatement 2nd Property, paragraph 6.1, illustrations 10-12. Demurer to the causes of action for breach of warranty of habitability, good faith and fair dealing is overruled. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support these causes of action re: inadequate garbage receptacles and rent increase. First Amended Complaint is not uncertain. Prevailing party to submit order approved as to form. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
